{{Quote|Our current armory no longer meets the demands of our song writers and performers in their quest to entertain the galaxy. We are pleased to partner with Balmorran Arms to equip our security and defense regiments, while significantly enhancing our automata arsenal.|Koner Blihrad|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_4.html|Balmorran Secures Musician Rearmament Contract}}</ref>}}
'''Koner Blihrad''' was the leader of the [[Melody Fellowship]], a group of [[Musician/Legends|musicians]] and agents that formed in response to the increased danger [[Artist/Legends|artists]] traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Char-stub}}
